feeds.title: 药物 · 临床试验
feeds.term: (lecanemab OR donanemab OR "anti-amyloid" OR "tau-targeting" OR trontinemab) AND ("clinical trial"[Publication Type] OR phase OR efficacy)

feeds.title: 机制 · 基础研究
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND (amyloid OR tau OR neuroinflammation OR APOE OR microglia) AND (mechanism OR pathology OR pathogenesis)

feeds.title: 诊断 · 生物标志物
feeds.term: (Alzheimer) AND ("p-tau217" OR "plasma biomarker" OR "blood biomarker" OR "amyloid PET" OR "GFAP") AND (diagnosis OR detection OR screening)

feeds.title: 预防 · 生活方式
feeds.term: (Alzheimer OR dementia) AND (prevention OR diet OR exercise OR "cognitive reserve" OR lifestyle OR "physical activity") AND (cohort OR "risk factor" OR longitudinal)

feeds.title: 新手村 · 入门综述
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND ("Review"[Publication Type]) AND (overview OR introduction OR "current understanding" OR primer OR basics)

drug.title: Microglial checkpoint collapse in Alzheimer's disease: a tri-axial framework for biomarker-informed neuroimmune therapy.
drug.zh: 小胶质细胞检查点崩溃是阿尔茨海默病核心机制，据此提出三轴框架指导生物标志物驱动的神经免疫治疗。

drug.title: Longitudinal biomarkers in dementia with Lewy bodies: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
drug.zh: 路易体痴呆纵向生物标志物荟萃分析揭示脑萎缩与临床进展显著相关。

drug.title: Anti-amyloid therapy eligibility in a longitudinal brain-donor cohort with post mortem confirmation.
drug.zh: 纵向脑库尸检证实，仅24.5%早期AD患者符合抗淀粉样蛋白治疗资格。

drug.title: Quantifying Short-Term Functional Changes After Lecanemab Treatment in Early Alzheimer's Disease: An Exploratory 3-Month Follow-Up Case Report Using Eye Movement and Gait Analysis.
drug.zh: 3个月仑卡奈单抗治疗早期AD，眼动与步态分析可量化短期功能改善。

drug.title: The potential of key Alzheimer's plasma biomarkers to mimic tau PET MUBADA-based disease staging.
drug.zh: 血浆P-tau217等生物标志物可替代tau-PET实现阿尔茨海默病分期，尤其适用于低至中度tau负荷患者。

drug.title: Immunotherapy with B28, an antibody to Aβ oligomers, potently decreases amyloid plaques, microgliosis, and memory decline in APP knock-in mice.
drug.zh: B28抗体通过清除Aβ寡聚体和斑块，显著减轻APP敲入小鼠的神经炎症和记忆衰退。

drug.title: The mechanisms and strategies for Alzheimer's disease prevention: An update.
drug.zh: 本综述强调通过管理高血压、糖尿病、优化微量元素与维生素及规律运动等可调控风险因素，是当前预防阿尔茨海默病的核心策略。

drug.title: Simulation of long-term lecanemab treatment effect on Alzheimer's disease progression.
drug.zh: 模拟显示，早期AD患者使用lecanemab可将疾病进展延缓约4.5年。

mech.title: Study on the Effects and Mechanisms of Resveratrol in Improving Cognitive Impairment in Aβ1-42-Induced Alzheimer's Disease Model Mice.
mech.zh: 白藜芦醇通过激活自噬并抑制衰老标志物，改善Aβ诱导的阿尔茨海默病模型小鼠认知障碍。

mech.title: Beyond Amyloid: Evolutionary and Immune-Metabolic Perspectives on Alzheimer's Disease.
mech.zh: 阿尔茨海默病是涉及免疫-代谢-微生物互动的多系统疾病，超越经典淀粉样蛋白假说。

mech.title: Glymphatic dysfunction associates with regional white matter hyperintensities and plasma amyloid-β burden across the Alzheimer's disease continuum.
mech.zh: 类淋巴功能障碍与白质高信号及血浆Aβ负荷在AD全程中显著关联。

mech.title: Chronic Lithium Exposure Reshapes PI3K-mTOR-linked Proteostatic Networks in the Hippocampus of an Alzheimer's Disease Mouse Model.
mech.zh: 慢性锂暴露通过重塑PI3K-mTOR相关蛋白稳态网络改善阿尔茨海默病小鼠海马病理。

mech.title: The Protective Effects of Small-Molecule Compound 0242 Against LPS-Induced Neuroinflammation and in P301S Tau Transgenic Mice.
mech.zh: 小分子化合物0242通过抑制神经炎症和调控NF-κB/TLR/JAK-STAT通路，在阿尔茨海默病模型中发挥保护作用。

mech.title: Senescent cells accumulate lipid droplets.
mech.zh: 衰老细胞通过积累脂滴驱动阿尔茨海默病相关代谢重编程。

mech.title: From infection to dysfunction: viral triggers and antiviral immune factors in Alzheimer's disease pathology.
mech.zh: 神经病毒感染与抗病毒免疫失调通过神经炎症、淀粉样变及tau蛋白病变驱动阿尔茨海默病进展。

mech.title: [Consistency evaluation of the domestic Lifotronic platform and foreign luminescence platforms in detecting core cerebrospinal fluid biomarkers in Chinese Alzheimer disease patients].
mech.zh: 国产Lifotronic平台与进口发光平台检测中国AD患者脑脊液核心标志物结果一致性好。

dx.title: Deep Plasma Proteomics-Based Diagnostic Panel for Early Detection of Amnestic Mild Cognitive Impairment.
dx.zh: 基于深度血浆蛋白质组学构建的诊断模型可有效早期识别遗忘型轻度认知障碍。

dx.title: Evaluation of plasma neurofilament light chain and glial fibrillary acidic protein in myasthenia gravis: A controlled cohort study.
dx.zh: 血浆NfL和GFAP在重症肌无力患者中无显著升高，不支持作为疾病活动性生物标志物。

dx.title: Glymphatic dysfunction associates with regional white matter hyperintensities and plasma amyloid-β burden across the Alzheimer's disease continuum.
dx.zh: 类淋巴功能障碍与白质高信号及血浆Aβ负荷在AD连续谱中显著关联。

dx.title: Plasma-based neurobiological protein biomarkers as predictors of dementia progression: Insights from longitudinal aging study in India - Diagnostic assessment of dementia.
dx.zh: 印度纵向老龄化研究证实，血浆Aβ42/40比值、NfL、GFAP、pTau181及t-tau可预测轻度认知障碍向痴呆的转化。

dx.title: Comparative evaluation of automated MRI-based brain volumetry software for estimating cognitive domains in early Alzheimer's disease.
dx.zh: 四种MRI脑容积软件在早期阿尔茨海默病认知域预测中表现不一，FreeSurfer综合性能最优。

dx.title: Inflammatory alterations mediate tau-associated neurodegeneration.
dx.zh: 炎症改变介导tau相关神经变性，且小胶质细胞密度升高与tau病理分布一致。

dx.title: Cardiovascular Biomarkers as a Primary Care Gateway to Early Alzheimer's Disease Detection: The Case for an Integrated Screening Approach.
dx.zh: 心血管生物标志物可辅助初级保健中阿尔茨海默病的早期筛查。

dx.title: [Standard operating procedure for pre-analytical blood biomarker processing in Alzheimer's disease (2026 edition)].
dx.zh: 2026版阿尔茨海默病血液生物标志物前处理标准操作流程，强调规范操作对提升检测可靠性和可比性的关键作用。

prev.title: From diabetic foot to dementia: A neurovascular continuum linking systemic diabetic vasculopathy, cerebral small vessel disease, and glymphatic dysfunction.
prev.zh: 糖尿病通过系统性血管病变引发脑小血管病和类淋巴功能障碍，构成从足部到痴呆的神经血管连续体。

prev.title: Mortality trends and projections for type 2 diabetes with concomitant Parkinson's versus Alzheimer's disease among older United States adults, 1999-2023: A retrospective cohort study.
prev.zh: 1999-2023年美国老年2型糖尿病合并帕金森病的死亡率持续高于合并阿尔茨海默病，且差距在扩大。

prev.title: Epidemiological Studies on Type 2 Diabetes Using the German Disease Analyser Database: A Narrative Review.
prev.zh: 基于德国疾病分析数据库的综述揭示，2型糖尿病与阿尔茨海默病风险存在流行病学关联。

prev.title: Income level and the risk of incident dementia among adults aged ≥50 with newly diagnosed type 2 diabetes: a population-based cohort study using the NHIS-Senior database in South Korea.
prev.zh: 新发2型糖尿病的中老年人中，低收入水平显著增加痴呆风险，且该关联独立于其他已知因素。

prev.title: From organ age gaps to precision geromedicine: multi-omic and imaging frameworks for heterogeneous biological aging.
prev.zh: 多组学与影像学揭示器官衰老异质性，为阿尔茨海默病的精准老年医学提供新框架。

prev.title: Risk factors for bipolar hemiarthroplasty dislocation: a retrospective cohort study.
prev.zh: 双动半髋置换术后脱位风险与手术入路及假体位置相关，而非患者基础因素。

prev.title: Multimorbidity Clusters Among People Aged 65 Years and Over in Australia: A Nationwide Cross-Sectional Data Linkage Study.
prev.zh: 澳大利亚65岁以上人群存在性别特异的多病共存网络簇，且模式随年龄、社会经济地位和地理区域变化。

prev.title: Longitudinal effects of comorbidities on brain structure and cognition in older breast cancer survivors.
prev.journal: Journal of the National Cancer Institute
prev.zh: 老年乳腺癌幸存者中，合并症加速脑结构退化与认知下降，而非癌症本身。

intro.title: [Research progress on role of PINK1/Parkin-mediated mitophagy in Alzheimer's disease and TCM interventions].
intro.journal: Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zho
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑细胞里的“垃圾清理系统”坏了会加速老年痴呆，并介绍了中药如何帮忙修复这个系统，对预防或延缓病情有用。

intro.title: Calibrating microglia states in Alzheimer's disease: decoding immune-metabolic networks and nano-targeted multicomponent therapies.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里的小卫士（小胶质细胞）如何通过调整自身状态来对抗阿尔茨海默病，帮你理解未来可能出现的更安全、更精准的新疗法。

intro.title: Brain Endothelial Glycocalyx as a Blood-Facing Translational Interface in Alzheimer's Disease: Beyond "Leaky" Barriers Toward Repair-First Stratification.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑血管表面一层糖膜在老年痴呆中如何受损，帮普通人理解未来可能通过修复这层膜来早期预防或治疗。

intro.title: HDAC3 in Alzheimer's Disease: established evidence, unresolved questions, and translational priorities.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫HDAC3的蛋白如何影响老年痴呆，帮普通人看懂这个蛋白到底是敌是友、未来能不能用来治病。

intro.title: Advances in 3D cell culture models for alzheimer's disease drug discovery.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是用更逼真的3D脑细胞模型来测试老年痴呆药物，帮普通人更快找到有效疗法。

intro.title: From Tradition to Translation: A Critical Appraisal of Bacopa monnieri for Neuroprotection from Preclinical and Clinical Perspectives and Challenges in Utilization.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是研究一种叫“假马齿苋”的草药能否保护大脑、延缓老年痴呆，对外行的用处是帮你了解这种天然植物可能带来的希望和目前存在的局限。

intro.title: Neuroinflammation in Alzheimer's Disease (AD) and Glioblastoma (GBM): Shared Mechanisms and Therapeutic Insights.
intro.zh: 这篇综述对比了老年痴呆和脑癌两种病里大脑发炎的相同点和不同点，帮普通人理解为什么抗炎治疗可能对这两种病都有用。

intro.title: Battling Parkinson's and Alzheimer's: The Neuroprotective Power of Carnosic Acid.
intro.journal: Journal of biochemical and molecular tox
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是迷迭香里的一种天然成分如何保护大脑、对抗帕金森和阿尔茨海默病，帮普通人了解未来可能的食疗辅助思路。
